ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Whether the passenger survived or not */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Class of the passenger */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the passenger */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard */,
  "fare" REAL /* Passenger fare */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Embarkation point */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of service */,
  "who" TEXT /* Who the passenger is (man, woman, child) */,
  "adult_male" INTEGER /* Whether the passenger is an adult male */,
  "deck" TEXT /* Deck number */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language spoken by the passenger */,
  "occup" TEXT /* Occupation of the passenger */,
  "home_port" TEXT /* Home port of the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "price_range" TEXT /* Price range for the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "embarkation_points" (
  "embarkation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each embarkation point */,
  "embarkation_point" TEXT /* Name of the embarkation point */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the embarkation point */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the embarkation point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the embarkation point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("embarkation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "decks" (
  "deck_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deck */,
  "deck_number" TEXT /* Number of the deck */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the deck */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the deck */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deck_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger the ticket belongs to */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Number of the ticket */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare of the ticket */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class of the ticket */,
  "embarkation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the embarkation point */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of ticket purchase */,
  "purchase_location" TEXT /* Location of ticket purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_embarkation_id FOREIGN KEY ("embarkation_id") REFERENCES embarkation_points ("embarkation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vessels" (
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vessel */,
  "vessel_name" TEXT /* Name of the vessel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vessel */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the vessel */,
  "beam" REAL /* Beam of the vessel */,
  "gross_tonnage" REAL /* Gross tonnage of the vessel */,
  "builder" TEXT /* Builder of the vessel */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the vessel was built */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voyages" (
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voyage */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vessel making the voyage */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Date of departure */,
  "arrival_date" TEXT /* Date of arrival */,
  "route" TEXT /* Route taken by the vessel */,
  "voyage_number" INTEGER /* Voyage number */,
  "captain" TEXT /* Captain of the vessel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voyage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manifests" (
  "manifest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manifest entry */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voyage the manifest belongs to */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger or crew member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the passenger or crew member (passenger, crew, officer) */,
  "boarding_date" TEXT /* Date of boarding */,
  "boarding_location" TEXT /* Location of boarding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manifest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_manifests_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_manifests_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew_members" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "crew_name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the crew member */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the crew member */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the crew member joined */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the crew member left */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ages" (
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age range */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Range of ages */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age range */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age in the range */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age in the range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets_classes" (
  "ticket_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket class */,
  "ticket_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the ticket class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ticket class */,
  "price_range" TEXT /* Price range for the ticket class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the port */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the port */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the port */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the port */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the route */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the route */,
  "travel_time" REAL /* Travel time of the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, officer, crew) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with the permission */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_status" (
  "survival_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survival status */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Whether the passenger survived or not */,
  "death_cause" TEXT /* Cause of death if the passenger did not survive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survival_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survival_status_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)
